Bash(# Check retrobrews for bladebuster with correct filename
curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/retrobrews/nes-games/git/trees/master?recursive=1" | python3 -c "import sys,json; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['path']\) for f in t.get\('tree',[]\) if f['path'].endswith\('.nes'\)]" 2>&1)
